name: HTS_SHIFT_NOTIFICATIONS
description: Table holding information about shift notification flow and status.

columns.Name: SHIFT_NOTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a Shift

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: This refers to the primary key on the self-scheduling group row of the relevant schedule.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Contain the schedule shift id involved in the notification. Can be null.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The field contains the unique id to group identical shifts

columns.Name: NOTIFY_HOME_DEPT_FLAG
columns.Comments: For publish, If set to ye, don't need to send separate notification to home department workers

columns.Name: NOTIFY_OTHER_DEPT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Applicable to Schedule level notification or Shift level notification

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
